message:
refactor(fcp-bootstrap,fcp-conformance,fcp-sandbox): Code quality improvements

fcp-bootstrap:
- hardware_token.rs: Simplify token validation
- phase.rs: Add phase transition documentation
- recovery_phrase.rs: Extend recovery phrase generation with entropy options
- time_validation.rs: Improve time bounds validation
- tests/bootstrap_integration.rs: Restructure test setup
- tests/golden_vectors.rs: Simplify test assertions

fcp-conformance:
- compliance.rs: Improve check result formatting
- interop/cross_zone.rs: Simplify cross-zone test setup

fcp-sandbox:
- credential_injection_integration.rs: Remove redundant assertions

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
